name: @rm-netsu/esm-chatcompletions-client
description: A lightweight, zero-dependency ESM client library for the Chat Completions API

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir=dist --target=node --format=esm --minify --sourcemap && bunx tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.build:browser: bun build src/index.ts --outdir=dist --target=browser --format=esm --minify --sourcemap && bunx tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist

author: rm-netsu
